scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check script.js && node --check admin/admin.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js && node scripts/check-wrangler-config.js
scripts.hash-id: node -e "const crypto=require('crypto'); const id=process.argv[1]; if(!id) throw new Error('Usage: npm run hash-id -- <ACCESS_ID>'); console.log(crypto.createHash('sha256').update(id).digest('hex'))"
scripts.hash-password: node -e "const crypto=require('crypto'); const p=process.argv[1]; if(!p) throw new Error('Usage: npm run hash-password -- <PASSWORD>'); const s=crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex'); const h=crypto.pbkdf2Sync(p,s,100000,32,'sha256').toString('hex'); console.log('100000:'+s+':'+h)"
